svg.text: End-to-End Process Flow — Surface AQI Prediction & HCHO Hotspot Detection
T, RH, U/V, TP, SP, BLH
Static Layers: Land cover · Elevation · Population
Grid Aggregation — Snap all to 0.1° India grid (68–97.5°E, 8–37.5°N)
Temporal Alignment · Quality Control — Daily resample, fill, outlier removal
AQI: Rolling means (3d/7d) · Sin-cos temporal cycles · 3×3 spatial context
HCHO: Z-score anomaly · Persistence · DBSCAN · Wind transport
Baseline ML: Random Forest · Gradient Boosting (GridSearchCV)
RF / GBM / CNN-LSTM trained on station-joined gridded data
R² · RMSE · MAE · Scatter plots · Time-series validation
Predict PM₂.₅ over all 0.1° India grid cells (tiling approach)
CPCB Indian AQI formula · PM₂.₅ → AQI category · Export NetCDF/GeoTIFF/GeoJSON
Join TROPOMI HCHO columns with FIRMS fire counts
Wind quiver overlays · Transport trajectory mapping
Cluster GeoJSON · Top-N hotspot regions CSV
Data Source: CSV / NetCDF / GeoJSON files in data/processed/
• CPCB Indian AQI formula for PM₂.₅ → AQI category
ISRO Smart India Hackathon 2024 — Surface AQI Prediction & HCHO Hotspot Detection using Satellite Data
